title: "I'M SELF-FUNDING" — THEN HE RAISED $290 MILLION
title_alt: THE TRAIL QUOTE VS THE FEC FILINGS — SELF-FUNDING
description:
The verbatim trail line at every 2016 rally: "I'm self-funding, I don't need their money." The FEC filings tell a different story.

FEC committee C00580100 (2016 general election): roughly $290 million raised from outside donors. FEC committee C00618389 (2020): roughly $1.1 billion. The donors were named on every quarterly filing — the receipts are public record.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=self-funding

#politics #trump #fec #shorts #factcheck
